package rulecoverage

func PositiveBuilderWriteRuneAsciiLiteral() string {
    ruleID := "builder_write_rune_ascii_literal"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`strings.Builder.WriteRune('x')` for ASCII literals instead of `WriteByte`."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
